theme_archetype: Swiss & High-Contrast (Light Theme) modified with Brand Palette
design_principles: Typography as the primary visual driver - let Plus Jakarta Sans do the heavy lifting
Zero images - rely entirely on CSS blobs, gradients, SVG shapes, and typography
Emoji as art - treat emojis as premium iconography placed in high-end structural containers
Generous spacing - enforce p-8 to p-24 minimums for breathing room and luxury feel
Asymmetry - use tension in grid layouts to avoid 'template' feeling

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl md:text-7xl font-extrabold tracking-tighter text-[#1B2A4A] leading-[1.1]
hierarchy.h2: text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tight text-[#1B2A4A] leading-[1.15]
hierarchy.overline: text-xs sm:text-sm font-bold tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-[#0ABFBC]

buttons.primary: inline-flex items-center justify-center px-8 py-4 bg-[#0ABFBC] text-white font-bold rounded-[8px] transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[0_8px_24px_-8px_rgba(10,191,188,0.6)] cursor-pointer
buttons.secondary: inline-flex items-center justify-center px-8 py-4 bg-transparent border-2 border-[#1B2A4A] text-[#1B2A4A] font-bold rounded-[8px] transition-all duration-300 hover:bg-[#1B2A4A] hover:text-white cursor-pointer

cards.base: bg-white border border-[#E2E8F0] rounded-[8px] p-8 transition-all duration-500 hover:border-[#0ABFBC] hover:shadow-[0_12px_40px_-12px_rgba(27,42,74,0.08)]

navbar.style: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 backdrop-blur-2xl bg-white/70 border-b border-[#E2E8F0] shadow-sm
navbar.links: text-[#4A5568] font-medium transition-colors hover:text-[#0ABFBC] px-4 py-2
navbar.active_link: text-[#1B2A4A] font-bold relative after:content-[''] after:absolute after:-bottom-1 after:left-4 after:right-4 after:h-0.5 after:bg-[#0ABFBC] after:rounded-t-md

language_toggle.style: flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 rounded-[8px] bg-[#F7F9FC] border border-[#E2E8F0] text-sm font-bold text-[#1B2A4A] cursor-pointer hover:border-[#0ABFBC] transition-colors

blobs.description: Animated blurred circles serving as background textures in the hero section. Do not use image files.
blobs.implementation:
Absolute positioned divs in background:
and a secondary blob with `#1B2A4A` and `animation-delay-2000`.

tailwind_config_additions.keyframes: blob: { '0%': { transform: 'translate(0px, 0px) scale(1)' }, '33%': { transform: 'translate(30px, -50px) scale(1.1)' }, '66%': { transform: 'translate(-20px, 20px) scale(0.9)' }, '100%': { transform: 'translate(0px, 0px) scale(1)' } }

wave_dividers.description: SVG path dividers for soft transitions between #FFFFFF and #F7F9FC sections.
wave_dividers.svg_code: <svg className="w-full h-16 md:h-24 fill-[#F7F9FC] block" preserveAspectRatio="none" viewBox="0 0 1440 74"><path d="M0,0 C240,74 480,74 720,37 C960,0 1200,0 1440,37 L1440,74 L0,74 Z"></path></svg>

avatars.description: CSS drawn initials circles for team members.
avatars.style: w-20 h-20 rounded-full bg-[#1B2A4A] flex items-center justify-center text-white font-bold text-2xl tracking-widest border-4 border-[#E6FAF9] shadow-lg

emojis.description: Emojis as icons, placed in high-end structured containers.
emojis.container_style: w-14 h-14 flex items-center justify-center rounded-[8px] bg-gradient-to-br from-[#E6FAF9] to-white border border-[#E2E8F0] text-3xl shadow-sm mb-6 transition-transform duration-300 group-hover:scale-110 group-hover:-rotate-3

sections: Hero: Massive H1 typography, background CSS blobs, primary & secondary CTA. High whitespace.
Stats Strip: 3-4 key metrics (e.g., '50+ Proiecte') in a CSS grid on #F7F9FC background.
About Preview: Asymmetric 12-col grid (Text col-span-5, Grid of 4 emoji tiles col-span-7).
Process Timeline: Vertical dashed line (border-l-2 border-dashed border-[#E2E8F0]), with steps marked by #0ABFBC absolute positioned dots.
Why Us (Bento): Assymetrical grid layout (span-12, span-8, span-4) highlighting agency strengths.
Final CTA: Large padded block (py-32), #1B2A4A background, white text, #0ABFBC button, subtle #0ABFBC blurred blob behind.
Header: Clean textual header with #0ABFBC overline.

Grid: 2x2 grid (1 col on mobile). Cards feature a top section with a soft gradient (#F7F9FC to #E6FAF9) centering a massive emoji, and a bottom white section with typography (title, tech tags in pill shapes, description).
Team: 2 Avatar cards using CSS initials instead of photos (e.g. [A] and [D]).
Values: 3-column layout with emoji-led base cards.

Phone Display Card: Centered massive bento-style box. Enormous text '+40 7XX XXX XXX', styled with text-[#1B2A4A] hover:text-[#0ABFBC] transition-colors. Link must use href="tel:+407XXXXXXX". No forms.

technical_instructions.framework: React with React Router v6. Ensure mobile-first responsiveness.
technical_instructions.i18n: Implement React Context (LanguageContext). State holds 'ro' or 'en'. Create a central dictionary object (e.g., translations.ro.home.title). All text must be instantly switched without page reload.
technical_instructions.animations: Use Intersection Observer API (e.g., simple custom hook 'useIntersectionObserver') to trigger fade-in-up classes: start with 'opacity-0 translate-y-8', transition to 'opacity-100 translate-y-0 transition-all duration-[800ms] cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1)'.
technical_instructions.testing: CRITICAL: All interactive elements (buttons, nav links, language toggles, phone links) MUST have a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='nav-home-link').
technical_instructions.media: Absolutely no tags or imported images allowed. Render all visuals via CSS or text/emojis.
